title: Saudi Arabian Chicken and Pilaf Bowl
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish inspired by the cuisine of Saudi Arabia, featuring chicken, pilaf, and a tangy sauce.

ingredients.name: tangy sauce (mix of creme fraiche and lemon juice)

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together the creme fraiche and lemon juice to make the tangy sauce.
2. Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
4. In a large saucepan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
5. Add the chicken breast to the saucepan and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes.
6. Transfer the chicken to the oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
7. While the chicken is cooking, prepare the pilaf according to the package instructions.
8. To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of the pilaf on the bottom, followed by a piece of the cooked chicken.
9. Drizzle the tangy sauce over the top and sprinkle with flaky salt.
10. Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
